title: Choose between Istio and Linkerd by feature and footprint
description: Weigh Istio's Envoy-based feature breadth against Linkerd's lighter Rust micro-proxy and simpler operations for the workload's needs.
body: Use when selecting a mesh implementation. Do not pick the heaviest mesh by default. Actions: weigh Istio (Envoy data plane, rich traffic management, gateways, WASM extensibility, larger footprint and operational surface) against Linkerd (Rust micro-proxy, lower latency/memory, simpler mTLS and ops, narrower feature set); match to whether you need advanced routing/extensibility or minimal overhead. Validation signals include a proof-of-concept showing the proxy's per-hop latency and memory fit the SLO and the feature set covering the routing requirements. Risk boundary: migrating an existing production mesh between implementations is a major change and is human-gated.
